title: ASR Tactical American Universal Handcuff Key with Clip for All Standard Handcuff
description:
The ASR Tactical Standard Issue Oversize Handcuff Keys are designed to fit all leading brands of professional handcuffs. All styles have a back pin for double-locking handcuffs. Oversize 3" long handcuff key whose larger size provides increased ease of use, even with gloved hands.

ASR Tactical American Universal Handcuff Key with Clip for All Standard Handcuff

Stay prepared and in control with the ASR Tactical Universal Steel Handcuff Key with Clip.

Key Features

  • UNIVERSAL HANDCUFF COMPATIBILITY: Fits all leading professional steel double locking handcuffs and standard restraints
  • PROFESSIONAL GRADE: Made from premium heat-treated steel to ensure quality and withstand daily long-term use; knurled barrel body is comfortable to grip; No recycled or impure materials used in the manufacturing process
  • RAPID DEPLOYMENT QUICK ACCESS: Easy to handle and locate when needed; always reliable. Features a pocket clip for convenient, quick-access carry on pockets or gear
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - Perfect for law enforcement, security, police, fire agencies, and any other users of tactical equipment
  • BACK PIN: Includes built in back pin for unlocking double-locking handcuffs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRUNIKEY
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Large

Made from heat treated steel, this key is built to withstand daily use and deliver every time. The knurled barrel body is comfortable to grip, designed to fit all leading professional handcuff brands, it is the ultimate convenience tool for anyone who demands dependability. The added ease of access with the the XL handcuff key offers a greater surface area to hold onto and allows for much easier access with gloved hands than any other style keys on the market today.

All styles feature a back security pin for double-locking handcuffs. and include a pocket clip, making this easy to carry on the go. Simply attach the key to the lip of your pocket or gear for effortless and convenient access, ensuring you are always ready.
